samples.input: Dashboard fails to load when user has more than 200 projects. Affects 12 enterprise accounts. Started after v2.4.1 deployment.

output.rationale: Production outage for 12 paying enterprise accounts — dashboard unusable.

criteria: correct P0 severity for production outage

samples.input: NPS survey with 45 responses: 28 promoters (62%), 9 passives (20%), 8 detractors (18%). Top themes from detractors: slow load times (6), missing bulk actions (5).

output.primary_theme: Performance concerns centred on load times
output.actionable_insight: Optimise dashboard load time for large projects as highest-priority fix

criteria: connects detractor feedback to specific feature

samples.input: I just want to get to my dashboard and immediately see what everyone is blocked on, without reading through 40 Slack messages.

output.job: See blocked work immediately without reading messages
output.emotional_job: Feel in control without communication overhead

criteria: job statement is user-voice, not feature-voice
